## --- Day 17: Pyroclastic Flow ---

Some rocks are falling down in the cave and are getting pushed around by jets of hot gas.

*How many units tall will the tower of rocks be after 2022 rocks have stopped falling?*

``` {.python .cell-code}
len(inp[0])

gas = inp[0] * 3
```
